# CI/CD & GitOps

> **Certifications:** GitHub Actions

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| Jenkins (Shared Libraries, Groovy) | Expert | ⬜ Pending |
| GitLab CI/CD | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| GitHub Actions | Advanced (Certified) | ⬜ Pending |
| Argo CD | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| Flux CD | Intermediate | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- Jenkins pipeline architecture (Declarative, Scripted, Shared Libraries)
- Groovy DSL for pipeline standardization across SoC programs
- Multi-branch pipelines, parameterized builds, and artifact promotion
- GitOps delivery patterns (Argo CD / Flux CD) for declarative deployments
- Pipeline-as-code governance and reusable templates
- Event-driven CI/CD for OTA firmware delivery
